title: Should E'er The Loveless Day.
content:
Should e'er the loveless day remain
    Obscured by storms of hail and rain,

    Thy charms thou showest never;
    I tap at window, tap at door:
    Come, lov'd one, come! appear once more!

    Thou art as fair as ever!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe delivers a powerful performance in "Should E'er The Loveless Day."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
